description: Free-for-all: pit two or more contestants against each other, then crown a winner.
Staff `entrant` with as many models as you like (min 2, no cap) — each argues its own answer is best and picks apart the others. A single `judge` declares the winner and says why.

roles.description: Give your best answer, then argue why it beats the others. No mercy, no consensus-seeking.
Crown a single winner. Name it, justify it in a few tight sentences, and note the runner-up.
